currentFocus: PR-ready modularity wave accepted on main; docs/state now carry sanitized closeout truth and the next handoff is one bounded PatchBench/BinaryPatchesPage presentation-only follow-up.

currentDocsTruth.claimBoundary: Docs/state and presentation-helper integration only; no AppCore, patch catalog row, byte patch, launch argument, safe-copy manifest/signature, runtime proof, release/publication, Host/Join, online readiness, runtime audio, gameplay, visual, rebuild, no-noticeable-difference, Ghidra, hard-payload, installed-game, or original-BEA mutation claim change.

validation.previousWaveCloseout: Final acceptance recorded the PR-template and PatchBench presentation-helper wave as accepted on main at the closeout evidence commit; local campaign report paths are intentionally not tracked here.
validation.nextSlice: Use focused PatchBench static tests for presentation-only docs/code hardening, and add WinUI/AppCore gates before claiming any UI or behavior change.

Keep product, runtime, release publication, Host/Join, online readiness, runtime audio, gameplay, visual, rebuild, no-noticeable-difference, Ghidra, hard-payload, and installed-game mutation claims bounded to accepted evidence.
